name: games
text:
game philosophy - free fun

From "Ми забули, що таке ГРАТИ В ІГРИ". Core split: play games, don't complete them like a job.

Principles

  • Play, don't complete. The playing is the point.
  • Be Sisyphus — love the process, not the trophy.
  • Inefficiency is the rebellion. Wander. Waste time.
  • Don't make fun a duty. Refuse the command to "Enjoy!"
  • Don't rebuild work (grind, dailies, 100%) inside the game.
  • Treat games as art — study the world, decode the intent.
  • Solve creatively; don't bug-skip or exploit.
  • Drop bad games; go deep on good ones.
  • Resist the Share button, leaderboards, streamer-watching.
  • Be a participant, not a spectator. Bring back couch co-op.
  • Lose the loot, lose the fear. Play like a kid.

Games

  • Understood, not optimized: Outer Wilds, Disco Elysium, Obra Dinn
  • Process over goal: Journey, Death Stranding, Sable, A Short Hike, Tchia
  • No HUD / no guide: RDR2, Elden Ring, Shadow of the Colossus
  • Atmosphere: Firewatch, Inside/Limbo, Kentucky Route Zero
  • Sandbox like a kid: Tears of the Kingdom, Minecraft creative, Noita, Townscaper
  • Couch co-op: It Takes Two, Overcooked 2, TowerFall, Gang Beasts

More games

Returnal, Helldivers 2, Magicka 2, Abiotic Factor, No Man's Sky

  • The Ascent — кооперативный топ-даун шутер в киберпанковом мире
  • Diablo IV
  • ARC Raiders — экстракшен-шутер от третьего лица
  • King of Meat — онлайн-пати-экшен / бравлер, быстрые хаотичные матчи
  • Deep Rock Galactic — кооперативный шутер с яркой командной механикой
  • Battlefield V — классический сетевой шутер, крупные онлайн-бои
  • Back 4 Blood — командная борьба с ордами зомби
  • Cuphead — 2D платформер run-and-gun / boss-rush
  • Broforce — 2D run-and-gun платформер, пародия на боевики 80–90-х, тотальный абсурд
  • Fueled Up — кооперативная пати-игра в духе Overcooked
  • Lovers in a Dangerous Spacetime — кооп аркада, управление космическим кораблём на одном экране
  • Heavenly Bodies — кооп физическая головоломка в космосе, нулевая гравитация

On PS5:

  • Astroneer — space base-building with automation & resource logistics.
  • The Riftbreaker — base + supply chains feeding automated defenses.
  • Space Engineers ⚠️ — voxel ship/station engineering with power & logic.
  • Kerbal Space Program: Enhanced Edition — design rockets with real orbital physics.
  • Minecraft — redstone = deep logic-circuit automation.
  • Anno 1800: Console Edition — rich production chains & economy.
  • Surviving Mars — Mars colony with interlocking resource/power systems.
  • Tropico 6 — political & economic management.
  • Frostpunk / Frostpunk 2 — society-survival as a system.
  • Cities: Skylines — traffic, utility & zoning systems.
  • Dreams (PS exclusive) — visual logic/wiring creation suite. PC-only (not on PS5, but the genre's best):
  • Factorio — the factory-automation king.
  • Dyson Sphere Program — galaxy-scale factory builder.
  • Shapez 2 — abstract factory/logistics puzzler.
  • Captain of Industry — heavy industry & supply-chain sim.
  • Techtonica — first-person underground factory builder.
  • Satisfactory ⚠️ — 3D first-person factory builder (console TBD).
  • Zachtronics (Shenzhen I/O, Opus Magnum, Exapunks) — actual programming/engineering puzzles.

Silt, Creaks, Lost in Random, The Artful Escape, Psychonauts 2, Life is Strange, Stardew Valley, Door Kickers, Terraria, Sackboy: A Big Adventure, Astro's Playroom, Hades, Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart, Baldur's Gate 3, Cyberpunk 2077
